title: A round silver UFO spotted by 5 people in Brasília-DF [1994]
excerpt: DEC 13th, 1994. Time: 04:00 am. Duration: not determined. text_preview:
DEC 13th, 1994. Time: 04:00 am. Duration: not determined. From the window of her apartment in Asa Sul de Brasília, Distrito Federal, a woman with four other people observed, with the naked eye, an unidentified flying object with a round shape and silver color, flying at low speed. According to witnesses, the UFO was positioned right where “the Sun [normally is] at 08:00am” performing vertical and horizontal trajectories.

Cf. ARQUIVO NACIONAL (Brasil). Sistema de Informações do Arquivo Nacional (SIAN). Fundo ‘Objeto Voador Não Identificado (OVNI)’. Código de Referência BR DFANBSB ARX.0.0.385.
summary: Five people in Asa Sul, Brasília observed a round silver UFO performing vertical and horizontal maneuvers at low speed in the early hours of December 13, 1994.
